title: Add LLM Playground to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [LLM Playground](https://llmplayground.net) to chat
- LLM Playground is a chat workspace for GPT, Claude, Pollinations, and other AI models with markdown/LaTeX rendering. Add custom AI Characters and team servers with channels and per-member quotas.

Fixes #12240

gist.headline: Welcome to the Playground
gist.blurb: LLM Playground just landed in the Greenhouse! It's a slick chat workspace for all your favorite models, complete with custom characters and team servers.
gist.summary: Added LLM Playground to the community apps directory, featuring a chat workspace for multiple models, markdown/LaTeX rendering, and team servers.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use LLM Playground to manage custom AI characters and team chats with per-member quotas directly from the Greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy playground setting (sandbox, swings) but made of retro tech. The bee mascot (Polly) playing in a sandbox with the Monitor Robot, building sandcastles out of chat bubbles and server blocks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot playing in a digital sandbox. They are building sandcastles shaped like chat bubbles and server racks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic, wholesome vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot playing in a digital sandbox. They are building sandcastles shaped like chat bubbles and server racks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic, wholesome vibes.
